Use a Map for O(1) lookups and store entries as objects containing the value, expiration timestamp, and last-accessed time for LRU tracking.
For TTL support, store the absolute expiration time (Date.now() + ttlMs) with each entry. Check expiration on every GET operation and lazily clean up expired entries.

Prevent cache stampede by maintaining a Map of in-flight promises. When multiple requests miss the same key simultaneously, have them all await the same fetch promise instead of each triggering their own database call.

Implement LRU eviction by tracking lastAccessed timestamps. When the cache exceeds maxSize, scan for the entry with the oldest lastAccessed time and remove it. Consider using a doubly-linked list for O(1) eviction in production.
